lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਫਾਹਾ ਪਇਆ ਪਾਧੇ ਪਿਛੋ ਦੇ ਗਲਿ ਚਾਟੜਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: pahilaa faahaa peaa paadhe pichho de gal chaattarriaa |5|
lines.english: First, the teacher is tied down, and then, the noose is placed around the pupil's neck. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੈ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਗਇਓ ਮੂੜੇ ਏਕੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਕੁਥਾਇ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sasai sanjam geo moorre ek daan tudh kuthaae leaa |
lines.english: Sassa: You have lost your self-discipline, you fool, and you have accepted an offering under false pretenses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਪੁਤ੍ਰੀ ਜਜਮਾਨ ਕੀ ਸਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਏਤੁ ਧਾਨਿ ਖਾਧੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saaee putree jajamaan kee saa teree et dhaan khaadhai teraa janam geaa |6|
lines.english: The daughter of the alms-giver is just like your own; by accepting this payment for performing the wedding ceremony, you have cursed your own life. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਆਤਮੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੑਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਮੁਹਤਾਜੁ ਭਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar aatamai braham na cheenaiaa maaeaa kaa muhataaj bheaa |7|
lines.english: Within your innermost self, you do not recognize God, and you compromise yourself for the sake of Maya. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਮੈ ਮਤਿ ਹਿਰਿ ਲਈ ਤੇਰੀ ਮੂੜੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਡਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mamai mat hir lee teree moorre haumai vaddaa rog peaa |
lines.english: Mamma: You have been cheated out your intellect, you fool, and you are afflicted with the great disease of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਹਿ ਗੁਣਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਪੁਕਾਰਹਿ ਵਿਣੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਤੂੰ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: parreh guneh toon bahut pukaareh vin boojhe toon ddoob muaa |8|
lines.english: You read, and reflect, and proclaim out loud, but without understanding, you are drowned to death. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਕੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਭਰਮਿਓਹੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਮਮਤਾ ਲਾਗੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kakai kaam krodh bharamiohu moorre mamataa laage tudh har visariaa |
lines.english: Kakka: You wander around in sexual desire and anger, you fool; attached to possessiveness, you have forgotten the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੈ ਤਾਮਸਿ ਜਲਿਓਹੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਥਥੈ ਥਾਨ ਭਰਿਸਟੁ ਹੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: tatai taamas jaliohu moorre thathai thaan bharisatt hoaa |
lines.english: Tatta: In anger, you are burnt, you fool. T'hat'ha: That place where you live, is cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਪੈ ਪਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਵਹੀ ਮੂੜੇ ਪਰਪੰਚਿ ਤੂੰ ਪਲਚਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: papai paar na pavahee moorre parapanch toon palach rahiaa |
lines.english: Pappa: You shall not be able to swim across, you fool, since you are engrossed in worldly affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਘੈ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਮੂੜੇ ਦਦੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਨ ਤੁਧੁ ਲਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: ghaghai ghar ghar fireh toon moorre dadai daan na tudh leaa |9|
lines.english: Ghagha: You go begging from door to door, you fool. Dadda: But still, you do not receive the gift. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਭੈ ਭਵਜਲਿ ਡੁਬੋਹੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਲਤਾਨੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhabhai bhavajal ddubohu moorre maaeaa vich galataan bheaa |
lines.english: Bhabha: You have drowned in the terrifying world-ocean, you fool, and you have become engrossed in Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਓਹੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਇਹੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਲੇਖੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sachai aap khuaaeohu moorre ihu sir terai lekh peaa |10|
lines.english: The True Lord Himself has ruined you, you fool; this is the destiny written on your forehead. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਏਕ ਘੜੀ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee eko jaanai ek gharree meh paar peaa |11|
lines.english: One who comes to know the One Lord, by Guru's Grace, is carried across in an instant. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਵੈ ਵਾਰੀ ਆਈਆ ਮੂੜੇ ਵਾਸੁਦੇਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: vavai vaaree aaeea moorre vaasudeo tudh veesariaa |
lines.english: Wawa: Your turn has come, you fool, but you have forgotten the Lord of Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਨ ਲਹਸਹਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਤੂੰ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: eeh velaa na lahaseh moorre fir toon jam kai vas peaa |12|
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come again, you fool; you shall fall under the power of the Messenger of Death. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਝੈ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਝੂਰਹਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: jhajhai kade na jhooreh moorre satigur kaa upades sun toon vikhaa |
lines.english: Jhajha: You shall never have to regret and repent, you fool, if you listen to the Teachings of the True Guru, for even an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ਨਿਗੁਰੇ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਨਾਉ ਬੁਰਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: satigur baajhahu gur nahee koee nigure kaa hai naau buraa |13|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, there is no Guru at all; one who is without a Guru has a bad reputation. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਧੈ ਧਾਵਤ ਵਰਜਿ ਰਖੁ ਮੂੜੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhadhai dhaavat varaj rakh moorre antar terai nidhaan peaa |
lines.english: Dhadha: Restrain your wandering mind, you fool; deep within you the treasure is to be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵਹਿ ਜੁਗਾ ਜੁਗੰਤਰਿ ਖਾਹਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoveh taa har ras peeveh jugaa jugantar khaeh peaa |14|
lines.english: When one becomes Gurmukh, then he drinks in the sublime essence of the Lord; throughout the ages, he continues to drink it in. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗੈ ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਗਲੀ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gagai gobid chit kar moorre galee kinai na paaeaa |
lines.english: Gagga: Keep the Lord of the Universe in your mind, you fool; by mere words, no one has ever attained Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਬੂਝੁ ਤੂੰ ਮੂੜੇ ਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: haahai har kathaa boojh toon moorre taa sadaa sukh hoee |
lines.english: Haha: Understand the Lord's Sermon, you fool; only then shall you attain eternal peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਾਇ ਮੂੜੇ ਪਿਛਲੇ ਗੁਨਹ ਸਭ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਇਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan hiradai vasaae moorre pichhale gunah sabh bakhas leaa |15|
lines.english: Enshrine the Guru's feet within your heart, you fool, and all your past sins shall be forgiven. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪੜਹਿ ਤੇਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh parreh tetaa dukh laagai vin satigur mukat na hoee |16|
lines.english: The more the self-willed manmukhs read, the more pain they suffer. Without the True Guru, liberation is not obtained. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਰਾਮੁ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਬੂਝਿ ਲਹਿਆ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee jinaee raam pachhaataa niragun raam tinaee boojh lahiaa |17|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, those who recognize the Lord, understand the absolute Lord. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਿਨੑ ਕੈ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: raarai raam chit kar moorre hiradai jina kai rav rahiaa |
lines.english: Rarra: Center your consciousness on the Lord, you fool; abide with those whose hearts are filled with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਲਖਿਆ ਅਕਥੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: teraa ant na jaaee lakhiaa akath na jaaee har kathiaa |
lines.english: Your limits cannot be known; the indescribable Lord cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਨਿਬੜਿਆ ॥੧੮॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jina kau satigur miliaa tina kaa lekhaa nibarriaa |18|1|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, whose who have met the True Guru, have their accounts settled. ||18||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਛੰਤ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 1 chhant ghar 1 |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, First Mehl, Chhant, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਪਿਰ ਨੇਹੁ ਘਣਾ ਰਸਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dhan pir nehu ghanaa ras preet deaalaa raam |
lines.english: When the bride enshrines great love for her Husband Lord, He becomes merciful, and loves her in return.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਬਾਲੜੀਏ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਲੀਆਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mundh joban baalarree meraa pir raleeaalaa raam |
lines.english: O beautiful young bride, my Beloved Lord is very playful.
